answer:
I agree that we should consider if our goals will make others proud. While personal achievements can bring us a sense of pride and fulfillment, our actions and goals should also be aligned with the values and expectations of those around us.

From my personal experience, I have noticed that when I set goals that benefit not only myself but also others, it creates a positive impact on my relationships and overall satisfaction. For example, when I volunteered at a local charity organization, my goal was not just to gain personal fulfillment but also to make a meaningful contribution to the community. As a result, not only did I feel proud of my accomplishments, but I also received recognition from others who were proud of my efforts.

Furthermore, considering the impact of our goals on others helps build stronger and more supportive relationships. When we take into account the opinions and feelings of those around us, it demonstrates empathy and fosters a sense of unity and cooperation. It is important to remember that our actions and goals do not exist in isolation, but rather in the context of a larger community.

In conclusion, while personal pride is important, we should also consider the impact of our goals on others. Considering the perspectives and expectations of those around us not only strengthens our relationships but also contributes to a more harmonious and fulfilling society.
title: When we set a goal and accomplish the goal, we feel proud of ourselves. Some people believe that we should consider if our goals will make others proud. Do you agree or disagree? Provide support from your personal experience and/or observation to support your opinion.
extData:
{"answerTemplate":"开场白: 
"When it comes to setting goals, it's a personal journey. However, the influence of others, specifically [making them proud/their approval], is often [essential/irrelevant] to this process."

讨论观点:
 "Taking into account how our accomplishments might make others proud can [provide motivation/provide a sense of responsibility]. This is because [reason, such as it gives a sense of shared success or it showcases our dedication and hard work]."

提供例子: 
"For example, when I [describe a personal experience aiming to make others proud], I felt [emotion and further explanation]."

阐述个人目标:
"On the other hand, the ultimate purpose of setting and achieving goals should be personal fulfilment and growth. [Making oneself proud/achieving self-satisfaction] should be the [main driver/essential part]."

总结:
"In conclusion, while the pride and approval of others can be motivating, it is paramount that our goals primarily serve our own personal growth and satisfaction."
